items.title: Bitcoin edges above $77,000, but institutional activity suggests downside hedging

items.title: Bitcoin seals best monthly gain in a year as S&P 500 hits fresh all-time high
items.summary: Bitcoin finished April above $76,000 to preserve most of its monthly gains, but the S&P 500 stole the limelight with a trip back to record highs.

items.title: Strategy keeps STRC dividend at 11.5% as stock logs first monthly gain in nine
items.summary: STRC’s volume weighted average price of $99.76 for April kept the dividend steady for a third consecutive month.

items.title: Bitcoin risks extended retreat as April rally was futures-driven: CryptoQuant
